how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M.Sc. in Physics, Materials Science, Electronics, or Nanoscience, or an M.Tech in Electronics & Communication, or an equivalent degree. A NET/GATE qualification is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, along with 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Kanpur Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the advertisement before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive as per the available information.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow in this recruitment drive by IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job type is specified as contractual, meaning it is not a permanent government post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the provided link to the IIT Kanpur website. It is highly recommended to download and read the PDF for complete details.
